ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season record */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* The year of the season */,
  "league" TEXT /* The league in which the team played */,
  "place" INTEGER /* The finishing place of the team in the league */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins during the season */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Total draws during the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses during the season */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "cup_status" TEXT /* Status in the Bulgarian Cup */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Team's ranking at the end of the season */,
  "promotion_relegation" TEXT /* Promotion or relegation status of the team at the end of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level or tier of the league */,
  "governing_body" TEXT /* Governing body of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country or region of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament record */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* The year of the season in which the qualification status is assessed */,
  "qualification_status" TEXT /* Qualification status for the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of the tournament */,
  "team_performance" TEXT /* Team's performance in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_season_year FOREIGN KEY ("season_year") REFERENCES seasons ("season_year")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season record */,
  "average_goals_per_match" REAL /* Average goals scored per match for the season */,
  "average_points_per_game" REAL /* Average points earned per game for the season */,
  "possession_percentage" REAL /* Possession percentage for the season */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Shots on target for the season */,
  "passing_accuracy" REAL /* Passing accuracy for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season record */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Goals conceded by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player record */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "appearances" INTEGER /* Number of appearances by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player metric record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player record */,
  "possession_percentage" REAL /* Possession percentage for the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Shots on target for the player */,
  "passing_accuracy" REAL /* Passing accuracy for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
